name: instagram-clone
description: A full-stack Instagram clone built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, and MySQL.

scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/db.js && node --check backend/routes/auth.js && node --check backend/routes/posts.js && node --check backend/routes/users.js && node --check backend/routes/interactions.js && node --check backend/controllers/authController.js && node --check backend/controllers/postController.js && node --check backend/controllers/userController.js && node --check backend/controllers/interactionController.js && node --check backend/middleware/authMiddleware.js
